summary: First comprehensive test of Niyama Bassa (BassBass) handyman marketplace. Fixed MongoDB compound index error on parallel arrays. Backend: 100% pass (24/24). Frontend: All features verified - homepage, auth, admin dashboard, handyman profile, bookings, multilingual.
passed_tests: API Health Check - Niyama Bassa API v1.0.0 operational
GET /api/services - Returns 19 service categories and 25 districts
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user with valid token
Homepage loads with 19 service categories grid
District filter dropdown with 25 Sri Lankan districts
Language switching: English, Sinhala (නියම බස්ස), Tamil (நியம பஸ்ஸ)
Customer registration and redirect to homepage
Handyman registration and redirect to profile page
Handyman profile page: services selector, districts selector, save profile
Admin login redirects to admin dashboard
Admin dashboard: Overview, Approvals, Users tabs
Admin approvals: Approve/Reject buttons for pending handymen
Admin users: Table with filters (all, customer, handyman, shop, admin)
Service list page: Shows handymen for selected service
Handyman detail page: Profile card, Call Now, WhatsApp, Book Now buttons
Booking form: Description, date, time, address, phone fields
Bookings page for handyman: Accept/Reject/Start Work buttons
Booking status flow: Pending → Accepted → Start Work
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed MongoDB compound index error on parallel arrays (services, districts_served)
seed_data_creation: Created approved handyman with plumber/electrician services in Colombo/Gampaha/Kalutara districts for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Homepage with 19 services, 25 districts filter, multilingual (EN/SI/TA), user registration (customer/handyman/shop roles), admin dashboard with approvals/users tabs, handyman profile creation with services and districts selection, booking creation and status management. One bug was fixed: MongoDB compound index error on parallel arrays (services and districts_served) - created separate indexes instead.

bug_fixes.description: Fixed MongoDB WriteError: cannot index parallel arrays [districts_served] [services]
bug_fixes.root_cause: MongoDB doesn't support compound indexes on multiple array fields
bug_fixes.fix: Changed from compound index await db.handyman_profiles.create_index([("services", 1), ("districts_served", 1)]) to separate indexes and added code to drop old index on startup
